narrative:
Precinct Toledo 16B (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,161 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.5 percentage points.
